positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial journey: a vibrant nebula swirling with deep indigo, emerald green, and gold stardust, framing a silhouette of abstract mountains under a crescent moon. The composition must be centered and perfectly balanced, featuring strong contrast between the glowing nebula and the sharp, dark foreground silhouettes. Art style: vector illustration meets ethereal watercolor, utilizing clean lines and flat color washes with gradient overlays. Lighting should suggest a magical dawn, maximizing visual pop and detail for a t-shirt print. Intricate cosmic patterns and geological forms.
negative: low detail, blurry, grainy, amateur drawing, watermark, signature, text, logo, copyright, dirty, muddy, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, multiple subjects, --ar 16:9, --ar 1:1
